title: selago barbula
intro: Selago barbula, also known as Blue Cape or Cape Blue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been utilized to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Selago barbula include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and aid in the healing of wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
